markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, workflow, and priorities for the new thought leadership series.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Launching two content streams: a high-level "Thought Leadership" series (on-site blog & Substack) and a technical "Agentic Data" series (new site category).](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**Target Audience Shift:** The "Agentic Data" series will use simple language ("tools," "connectors") to reach non-expert engineers (e.g., software, product) building AI agents, moving beyond the traditional data engineering audience.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [**Workflow:** The Airbyte team will finalize writing guidelines today, unblocking GrowthX to draft the first articles. Content will be reviewed by Kashal and Redwood, then published using the existing Webflow API.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Launch Plan:** The series intro post launches this week, enabling rapid feedback on the first articles to refine the planned weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Cadence

  - [**Initial Focus:** The first sprint prioritizes the thought leadership series to establish voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**Cadence Goal:** Publish one article per week.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Future Work:** After establishing the initial cadence, the team will explore more intensive PSEO (Programmatic SEO) initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### Content Types & Placement

  - [**"Thought Leadership" Stream**](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Content:** High-level, strategic pieces (e.g., "9 layers of authentic infrastructure").](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Placement:** Published on the main Airbyte blog and Substack.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Goal:** Amplify reach and build backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [**"Agentic Data" Stream**](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Content:** Technical, educational pieces (e.g., "What is AI agent orchestration?").](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Placement:** A new, dedicated category on the Airbyte site.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build topical authority in the agentic data space.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

### Workflow & Collaboration

  - [**Writing Guidelines:** Redwood will provide final feedback today, unblocking GrowthX to begin drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Content Review:** Kashal and Redwood will review all drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [**Publishing:** The team will use the existing Webflow API workflow, managed by Tanmay.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### Audience & Positioning

  - [**Challenge:** The new target audience—software and product engineers building AI agents—are not data experts.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use simple, accessible language (e.g., "tools," "connectors") instead of data-specific jargon (e.g., "ETL").](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Rationale (Arcade Example):** Arcade's success comes from its clear, simple messaging. Airbyte will emulate this while leveraging its data engineering pedigree to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**Category Creation:** The strategy includes publishing on topics with low/no search volume to establish early authority in a new, emerging category.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Redwood:** Provide final feedback on writing guidelines (today, Nov 19).](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Redwood, Kashal, Aida:** Prioritize 10–15 editorial topics from the content calendar (today, Nov 19).](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [Draft initial thought leadership articles once guidelines are finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Develop high-level PSEO ideas for next week's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [**Tanmay:** Create the new "Agentic Data" content category on the Airbyte site.](https://fathom.video/share/Bx289m-j5JEps7mQX5brqTp9jamtv3ys?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
